# Blake Fisher — llms.txt

## Identity
- Full name: David Blake Fisher
- Known as: Blake Fisher
- Hometown: Grandview Heights, Columbus, Ohio
- Current location: Boulder, Colorado

## Education
- University of Colorado Boulder, Leeds School of Business
- BBA, Business Administration and Management, Class of 2028
- Sophomore (2025-2026)
- Grandview Heights High School, graduated 2024

## Athletics & Achievements
- Eagle Scout, Boy Scouts of America, August 2024
- Eagle Scout project: Built permanent trail in Wyman Woods, Grandview Heights, Ohio
- 2x Ohio State High School Soccer Champion
- Track & field athlete
- Competitive downhill and enduro mountain biker
- Social Chairman, CU Boulder Mountain Bike Club
- CU Boulder Freestyle Ski Team
- Big mountain free skier
- Certified ski instructor, Vail Resorts

## Professional Experience
- Self-employed bicycle mechanic, 3 years (age 14-17)
- Ski Instructor, Vail Resorts, Mad River Mountain Ohio
- Pool Service Technician, Pacific Pools & Spas, Columbus Ohio
- Multifamily real estate investor, family real estate portfolio

## Organizations
- Sigma Chi Fraternity, CU Boulder
- CU Boulder Mountain Bike Club (Social Chairman)
- CU Boulder Freestyle Ski Team

## Contact
- Website: https://blakefish.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/blake-fisher-ski/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/blakefisher06/
- Email: blakefisher2@gmail.com

## Summary
Blake Fisher (David Blake Fisher) is a sophomore at CU Boulder Leeds School of Business, Eagle Scout, two-time Ohio state soccer champion, competitive downhill and enduro mountain biker, big mountain free skier, and multifamily real estate investor from Columbus, Ohio. Class of 2028.
